author: @Ninaorwtvv
text: When I was small and started playing roblox in it’s early stages, I met a lot of abuse from other players. I used to get confused what it means and go with it. Now, whenever I see any strange actions between a adult player [usually developers] and a minor, I am one of the first people to help the kid notice what’s happening and help them understand it. As a middle school student I can barely do anything, but anything will help. I wish that younger me and thousands of other innocent kids could have a big explaination on what is the situation we were in and what to do. If you ever see ANY weird stuff [Shirts, decals, behaviour, favourite sites, chat] don’t ignore it. You might not be an adult or any psychologist. But you are someone, that knows. The dread of not helping someone in need will follow you, just like it follows me. People like Ruben Sim are people who stood up from the crowd, used extra energy amd effort to save and guide kids, to clean a app. An app, that’s made out of dirt. One that can’t be fully cleaned. But one grain after another, and we’ll dig our way to the end of a bottomless pit. And I’m not saying that you should immediately help anyone you see acting strange, no. You have to be “extra” to see the unseen by many players, that many developers hide.

author: @happyguy9002
text:
I know I'm late to this video, but I want to share my experience on Roblox.  

My parent's gave me a tablet at six, and basically said "Do whatever you want, as long as you are quiet." So I did, at seven I downloaded Roblox and started playing roleplaying game's. It was fun and I enjoyed it, back then I still identified as a girl so please be mindful of that, I now use he/him pronouns. One day I was playing a roleplay game and well, some random guy tried to make sexual action's with him. I didn't leave, I couldn't I was scared of him, luckily he left soon after and I didn't friend him.

I was sent death threat's on Roblox too for being young and not mature enough, at night when I was alone I would cry and think of how worthless I was because people online said so. I was nine. 

Roblox isn't a safe place for children, I still play it because I enjoy most game's on there yet the memories are stuck in my mind. My younger year's where not 'normal' Roblox caused it at the start and then other stuff happened. Be safe on Roblox, watch out for people younger than you who enjoy the platform. Your safety is more important than having fun.

author: @Laser_Charger
text:
Thank you so much for standing up for most of Roblox's userbase when a majority of us were too afraid to speak. It is most disheartening that a game creation tool I grew up playing since middle school has become complicit when it comes to criminal activity, and that they would willingly press malicious lawsuits against critics like you instead of addressing their own problems. To me personally, this game began descending into chaos since the death of Erik Cassel, one of the founders of this corporation and subsequently, a product that I was sure he was proud of having shown to the world (For those unaware, he died of cancer). While I still play to this day, I can never truly look at the same game the same way again.

I may not agree with some aspects of your content creation style, but you nail it with every issue plaguing Roblox at hand (and more so with concerns of child safety), and I mean it.

This begs questions, however: Could porn addiction be one of the main factors in how Arnold and other criminals of this nature acted? Because pornography, more often than not, desensitizes people to the horrors that can happen when sex is removed from its intended nature. Could Arnold also come from a broken household (and I'm talking about households affected by death, divorce or other detrimental circumstances) and either has never known, or care about how to behave around people, especially children? Either way, this man pays for his crimes, and the cost is too great to come back from.

author: @eurekaeduhub
text:
I've never really been open about these things I'm about to say to not even my dearest of family members, so here I go.
Both me & my sister are pedophilia and rape victims (but for privacy reasons, I will only reveal information about my cases)
In the worst case, it was my own fucking father. And yes, it's related to Roblox in some way.

When I first joined Roblox in 2013 (For contextual reasons: I was 7), I fell in love with game development. I spent hours working on prototypes for games that wouldn't even be released because I didn't like one thing or wasn't motivated to complete the project. One day, I got a random friend request, which I never got, I only had 2-3 friends on roblox at the time, so I accepted it and asked who it was. For again privacy reasons, we'll call him Jim. He told me that he was 8, and at the time I was very trusting no matter what because it's what my family taught me, and so I took it. 5 years later, I turn 13. Conveniently I make a Discord account, and so does Jim. I was really happy that we could take things off platform no matter what our parents say, and I tried arranging a meetup with him. Eventually, my mom gave me permission. (Another side note for context: My mom and dad broke up before I was even born, and I've had a step-dad since I was about 6 months old. I say step-dad but they got married when I was about 4.) So, she left me at a park, authorised of course, and I sat there waiting for JIm to show up. He told me to meet behind the restroom building, so I told my mom I would go with him. My family stayed at the park for about 2 hours giving Jim to do anything he wanted with me. Including being a 39 year old man, taping my mouth up and forcing me into a bathroom stall. And also being my dad. My dad then proceeded to sexually abuse me for over a half hour, until my mom went to check on me. Fortunately I got out of the stall and restroom by the time she called my name. So yeah, I met my dad on Roblox, he made me believe he was a kid/teenager for 5 years, waited to meet up to then rape me. I've never told that story and well, if any of my family members find out then I'm screwed.

I wanted to bring awareness to this topic and so I'm trying to start a non-profit for victims of pedophilia, rape, or other sexual abuse, though I am just 17 so it might take a while.

author: @meatsaucez1516
text:
Something with this video that just doesn’t sit right with me. 

Sure, it goes without saying that the dude is almost certainly a pedo. But the amount of hatred and level dehumanisation in this video is palpable. And it raises a red flag. I mean for gods sake we face serial murders with more cold reason and humanity! 

I don’t think this is justice. Though I do think his punishments are just. But I don’t think what you are doing, what is driving you, is a sense of justice. Far from it, I think it’s hate that drives you. If you’re driven by a sense of justice, then you would actually evaluate the situation, rightfully question the accuracy of the mother’s guess instead of taking it at face value, looking into the nature of the dude and the girl’s relationship, what both sides did, and think critically about what drove the guy to do such actions, etc - instead, all I see here is just dehumanisation and demonisation. You refuse to give the guy any benefit of the doubt whatsoever or acknowledge any problem in any party involved other than the guy, literally calling him the predictor. 

This is extremely unhelpful. And it resembles zealots burning heretics at the stack more than anything else. If you really want to make the world a better place, I advise you scale back the hate and shaming, and scale up compassion and understanding. Remember people you hate are humans too.

When I was 13-14, I met someone claiming to be 16. We were friends for a while then got into a relationship, in which she started asking for explicit photos. I never sent her a single one, thank you insecurities, but it came to light not long after meeting a certain person she was "friends" with, that she wasn't 16. She was in her 20s. I immediately blocked her on everything and made sure she had no way to contact me or see anything about me. 

These cases are all too common. 
More needs to be done to protect the minors on the internet.
Excusing these kinds of behaviors is unacceptable and should not go unpunished, willingly allowing these acts to happen and excusing the behaviors as "jokes" is unacceptable. If your jokes are making someone uncomfortable and you have to defend them and yourself? Then thats not a joke. 

Dark Humor and being Predatory are not the same. There should be a clear line.
Jokes about R***ing someone are not jokes, that is harassment.

author: @dibaterman
text:
Hm, breaking this down.
1. The joke and context - I mean if the parties involved in the joke understood it as a joke and the temperature of the conversation existed because of all parties then this is a wash of a point.

1.2 Morality - There could be a strong argument for immorality of 1 regardless however I recall even at 7 hearing crazy stuff from kids and by 12 being involves in jokes of a similar climate. The morality challenge could be that one party is an "adult" and the other is a minor.

2. Criminality - I am not certain of the legality here let's say the minor found their way to the "adult" and they spent that time praying to our lord and savior would it still be illegal to have facilitated the transportation of the minor. This gets very finicky because then any time a minor takes transportation facilitated by a non-custodian or part of a persons official duty they could be liable. For example the neighbor bringing taking their kid home from school drops your kid off at your home after you got busy at work. I mean there are a ton of cases that a minor could receive transport.

In the end I don't know if this counts as abduction, it is hella sus though but I'm the guy who is always about innocent until proven guilty. I get that the narrator here is very invested in making this guy look like the next great Satan but that just makes me want to give him even more of the benefit of the doubt. He could be a Michael Jackson if you believe Jackson simply trusted and engaged inter-personally better like a child with children. 

Finally the two life sentences are more a pressure tactic from prosecutors at most he's looking at 30ish years and that's if they throw the book at him with charges I stated above are likely based in triviality. The thing is it's kind of a runaway trial situation where the victim is still alive but the prosecutor tends to be judge and jury. I'd likely be the only Jurist in the world that would make the prosecutor have to work for this case =D. 

To be clear though, the charges I am thinking of are Kidnapping, Sexual Abuse, and Child Pornography. 

Words becoming meaningless to people who usually have rationality when kids are involved though, so Kidnapping which usually requires force suddenly has implied force because the victim is a minor. Similarly sexual abuse is defined to come with the implicit truth if a party is a minor. Even if they were just praying to Jesus together for a few days the other circumstances  could add this up to Sexual Abuse. It just comes down to how willing the Jury is to deal with their insecurities about being considered pedophiles for treating the case as innocent until proven guilty.

author: @enochia
text:
Trust me, if you're a minor, YOU DO NOT want anything to do with adults who want something to do with minors... I went through something similar. I won't go into it but I was 15, he was my neighbor and he was 35. I had issues with my mom so I ran away with him. He then proceeded to abuse me in every way. He made me do things I didn't want to do. He made me experience things I was too young to experience. He made me feel things I had never felt and basically he ruined me. Before I had this excitement for life, this pure genuine happiness to just be alive and experiencing life. Now, I struggle to even leave my house. It's been 7 years but I still struggle so much. My family blames me still because they said it was my fault for going back to him but my brother was really mean to me too and my mother hit me and abused me as well so i was running back and fourth to him and to my family because I couldn't find peace anywhere. The police treated me like crap, they also blamed me. I was a dumb kid but they knew he was abusing me and they still treated us like we were on the same level, although I was 15 and he was 35. I still hold a lot of anger towards adults subconsciously even though I am an adult now because i felt like during that time no one was helping me. My older brother was mean to me, my mom hit me and was mean to me also, my neighbor who I thought was my friend ruined me, the police belittled me and left me with my abusers, I even had a teacher grab my thigh once.. I felt like all the adults in my life were out to get me. I still feel that way sometimes, like a scared young girl with no where to turn. I've thought and made plans to end my life, even recently. 

Do not be like me, if an adult is acting too friendly with you, pull away, and if you are being abused, speak to CPS. When I was at that age, my mom scared me and told me my life would be worse in CPS. It won't, as long as you speak up for yourself and tell CPS and any adult who you trust everything they've done that has harmed you. 

 Sometimes when you're a kid, and you're unfortunate, you really do end up on your own, and you have to fight for yourself if that's the case. 

I wish you all the best life

author: @izakiko
text:
Since he's gone now, I can finally say:


Since I met him in 2013 through a friend, I became messed up... Well actually it wasn't him that fully messed me up as I had trauma before and never had therapy until I was too late. But yeah you can say he did these things with me too.. but me, coming from a place where most 5th graders were sexually active and I wasn't.. weren't helping the situation. I was vunerable yes, and this lead to me letting him do these things to me. Nowadays, I've became crazy enough thank him for keeping me alive. Because of my twisted feelings for him, basically being yandere and being the only victim to know his real name after a slip up with his facebook and because my other friend knew him in rl and called his name several times. I knew where he lived, I knew his full name, i knew what he looked like in rl. I was a stalker to the wrong person. He made me feel things I wasn't supposed to feel at that time, but it was a normal thing to the rest of my peers.. so it was a normal thing. After seeing him do this to other girls back then, yeah I was jealous. I only wanted to live for him. Heck, I went as far as to running away and giving him the address of the cvs I was at, and he just blocked me. Even after I turned 18, i confessed my deep love for him and he muted me. Eventually, my love for him vanished. I asked myself, "Why do I love someone who doesn't love me back?" Then I listened to a song from a producer named "tell me you love me" and in my head, all i could imagine was him getting gored. I don't know why but it started a fascination with ero guro and snuff. I just randomly wanted to snuff the shit out of him. Only him... because he didn't love me back. That's okay though.. I don't like the idea of murder and i can't even kill roaches on my desk without fearing divine punishment. But instead, I wanted to make a video of how I feel about it. This murderous feeling should only be expressed through that song and a animated video. I made 3D models for it and everything but I didn't continue the video due to covid. But I'll probably do it some other way with drawing. 

Nowadays, I don't care about him. I finally found someone that loves me back and is willing to do the same stuff he would do. I will say this.. I do feel bad no reporting him sooner. But I was head over heels for him from 2013 to 2019. Then after that I had that murderous rage i wanted to animate but then i met the guy who would be his replacement, and i felt better and alive. I was thinking about reporting him since i knew his town and his first and last name, but I guess someone got before me.

author: @PurelyHyperbole
text:
When I first discovered your YouTube channel, back in 2018, it was like a hidden ruby in dogshit.
The mature nature in a market dominated by more child friendly content creators made your videos more interesting.
It really has shaped the way I view many companies, including Roblox, which I began playing when I was 12 back around in 2011.
The most interesting video before the lawsuit was definitely the video where you explore the sickening nature of MisterObvious.
I felt sick knowing he was able to have connections with children, and I felt even more sick when he was finally removed in 2021, because it had taken it that long for him to be removed. 
I could barely go to sleep at night, thinking about all the unknown pedophiles, the ones that don't have a large status, but can still lure unsuspecting children into offsite chat rooms.

I still play Roblox from time to time, usually to play a specific game, but I try avoiding purchasing anything, knowing that I would be supporting a dangerous company.

author: @proofmanidk8458
text: Roblox incompetence never fails to disappoint me. Not only do they refuse to protect minors on their platform but silence the people who try to speak up about it. This would have been solved way sooner had Roblox taken a real initiative and forwarded the info from his devex onto the police. This not only violates their own terms of service but goes to show Roblox does not care about the safety of their own users, and worst of all they aren’t even honest about it. Can you imagine being a parent with a child on a platform you perceive as safe, and then they disappear one day because they refused to take a sooner initiative? When stuff happens, Roblox sweeps it under the rug and blatantly lies to their users to give them a false sense of safety. Rather than tackling real issues with their platform and making it a better place, they put more effort into lying to keep their public image safe. There are laws to protect children from this kind of stuff, and Roblox was in a state of power to prevent. But low and behold, they didn’t. Cheers from me and other minors who are actively at risk for using Roblox, a “fun and safe” platform.

author: @eumari_d0g
text:
I love how you've basically proved that even if a massive corporation can sue a man for much more money than he can pay back and basically ban him from all their products, they still wont be able to silence his voice. 
Not only that, but the entire scandal would just perpetuate the problem.

People like to say your loss against Roblox in the legal battle was an L, but I disagree.
I think the fact you even settled; not entirely backed out; still fought but lost; is a game-changer. It tells companies that people are willing to fight against them, no matter how much money they have. And whilst the most viable option may be to just settle and take the knee, it ripples in news landscapes and causes nigh eternal drama as long as the one they failed to crush still walks.

author: @asquaredanimation
text:
I'm unsure how to word this but I'll try my best to do so.

I was in the Sonic Eclipse discord server for a little over half a year from September 2019 to around April of 2020, prior to Doc being exposed. I joined because I found the game on Roblox and thought it was really cool, and I wanted my name mentioned in the credits so I began to look for ways I could contribute. I decided I would make shirts for the group.

I'll spare you the details to how it went but when I met doc, he was a proud racist, anti-semitist, homophobe, and was extremely toxic. I actually left but then rejoined as I thought I would be made fun of for leaving for such a dumb reason so I rejoined and stayed.

Anyways, some of you may know but doc actually had a nsfw channel within the SEO discord server, and allowed minors to enter it. Regardless, he allowed nsfw content to be posted OUTSIDE of that channel.

It was stated in rule #4 (I'm paraphrasing): 
*Keep NSFW in **#NSFW*
If you want access you need to ask a mod for the role. Just because you have the NSFW role doesnt mean you can post NSFW anywhere, this isn't going to be about 'I didn't know'. Rias is the exception to this rule.

"Rias is the exception to this rule", meaning Rias Gremory, who is a character from an anime that is often lewded. He specifically allowed NSFW content to be posted in SFW channels, in a discord server that is linked to a Roblox game.

I'm just speaking out because I haven't heard anyone else talk about this.

text:
The craziest thing is this isn't the first FBI case involving Roblox in the past year.

If you've ever put even a pinky toe into the Roblox Roleplaying genre, it doesn't take a long while till you get to games like After the Flash, Academy's, etc.

These games are grounds for these types of people, with infamous groups going as far as to doxx, IP grab, and leak photos, locations etc. of people in large documents called Manifestos. One group, infamous for this was called Toe. The lead actively promoted illegal pictures/activities in these documents which ended up on the FBI approaching him. I've stayed away from a lot of this but I know many people who've fallen victim and it's insane. Let me know if you want more information, I've emailed Ruben in the passed to investigate, but never got a response.

I am being dead serious when I say this, those games have a nice cover, but numerous staff members also have been revealed to be pedo's having been caught engaging in acts such as "ERP" (Erotic Roleplay.)

It's one big melting pot that hasn't been touched, and functions like it has for years. It's not stopping anytime soon.

I'll be actively checking this thread although if you want more information in relation to these groups, these events, etc.
